_meta.description: Persistent build model for o9nn/org-oc. Self-updated by each iteration of the optimizer. DO NOT edit manually — use scripts/run_iteration.py to refine.

missing_header.regex: fatal error: (.+\.h): No such file or directory
missing_header.diagnosis: Missing system header — need to install development package

missing_cmake_package.regex: Could not find a package configuration file provided by "(\w+)"
missing_cmake_package.diagnosis: Missing CMake package — upstream component not installed

missing_find_package.diagnosis: Missing Find module — upstream component not installed or CMake path wrong

undefined_reference.diagnosis: Linker error — library not linked or not installed

missing_shared_lib.diagnosis: Shared library not found at runtime — ldconfig needed or lib path wrong

cython_error.diagnosis: Cython not installed or version mismatch

permission_denied.diagnosis: Build trying to install to system path without sudo
